name: Blueberry Graham Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and beat in the sugar.
2. Beat in the eggs, one at a time.
3. Stir in the milk.
4. Combine the blueberries, graham cracker crumbs, flour, baking powder, and baking soda.
5. Add all at once to the egg mixture and beat until smooth.
6. Pour into a greased 8-inch spring form baking pan.
7. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 50 to 60 minutes, or until the top is richly browned.
8. Arrange blueberries over the top of the cake and garnish with a dollop of whipped cream.
Yield: 1 8-inch cake
